name: Orange-Spiced Oatmeal Raisins Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter or margarine, at room temperature (1/2 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange juice and raisins; let stand overnight.
2. Beat the butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and orange peel.
4. Combine the flour and baking soda; stir into the butter mixture.
5. Add the raisins, any soaking liquid, and oats; mix well.
6. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets, spacing 2 inches apart. Flatten slightly.
7. Bake at 350°F oven for 10-12 minutes.
8. Cool completely.
9. In a small, deep bowl, microwave the chocolate and oil for 3 to 4 minutes on LOW power, stirring once. Let stand 2 minutes; stir until smooth.
10. Dip one-third of the cookies; chill on waxed paper-lined baking sheets until chocolate is firm. Makes about 3 dozen.
